candidates.title: How agents are transforming work
candidates.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

candidates.title: Build a healthcare appointment agent with Amazon Nova 2 Sonic
candidates.summary: In this post, you will learn how to build a voice agent that handles appointment reminder conversations using Amazon Nova 2 Sonic and Amazon Bedrock AgentCore. The agent authenticates patients by voice, manages appointments (confirm, cancel, or reschedule), collects pre-visit health information, and escalates to human staff when needed. You handle routine calls at scale, which can help reduce no-show rates. This sample focuses on the agentic side of the problem: voice conversation and tool orchestration. A browser-based interface is included for testing. To connect the agent to actual phone lines for outbound dialing, you would integrate a telephony service such as Amazon Connect Customer.

candidates.title: How Loka Built a Natural, Low-Latency Voice Agent with Amazon Nova 2 Sonic
candidates.summary: In this post, we demonstrate the architecture and approach Loka used to solve a common frustration: robotic, slow voice assistants that cause customers to hang up, damaging brand reputation and driving up support costs.

candidates.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
candidates.summary: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

candidates.title: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
candidates.summary: As ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet told TechCrunch in May, what China can currently buy are older-generation deep ultraviolet tools — gear first shipped about a decade ago — the same machines the MATCH Act would now put off-limits.
